qids.subject: Data Structures
qids.prose: A program attempts to generate as many permutations as possible of the string, ' ' by pushing the characters in the same order onto a stack, but it may pop off the top character at any time. Which one of the following strings CANNOT be generated using this program? A. B. C. D.

qids.subject: Data Structures
qids.prose: A function defined on stacks of integers satisfies the following properties. and for all stacks and integers . If a stack contains the integers in order from bottom to top, what is ? A. B. C. D.

qids.subject: Data Structures
qids.prose: Consider the following C program: #include <stdio.h> #define EOF -1 void push (int); /* push the argument on the stack */ int pop (void); /* pop the top of the stack */ void flagError (); int main ()
